creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
Created attachment 240924
net/liferea: Update to 1.14.1

Liferea 1.14.1 was released and fixes a security problem:
https://github.com/lwindolf/liferea/releases/tag/v1.14.1

Unfortunately on my ElectroBSD 13.2-STABLE system
Liferea 1.14.1 reproducible crashes at start up.


This could be a local issue so I'm attached an updated
patch anyway. Please test it before committing it.
